description_long: This is a large, modern greenhouse with a semi-circular footprint and a prominent glass facade. The front features a wide, curved wall made almost entirely of transparent panels supported by a light-colored structural frame, allowing maximum sunlight to enter. The roof is also constructed from glass or similar transparent material, with a flat deck area and a railing on top, possibly for maintenance or observation. The base is a solid, cylindrical platform that elevates the greenhouse above ground level, and there are visible entryways with steps leading up to the main doors. Inside, lush green plants and a central circular feature are visible through the glass, emphasizing its function as a plant-growing environment. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on transparency and light.
description: A large, semi-circular modern greenhouse with expansive glass walls and roof, elevated on a cylindrical base and filled with visible greenery inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved glass facade, main entrance, and interior plants clearly visible through the transparent panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the sloped glass roof, structural frame, and the cylindrical base supporting the greenhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wall with a secondary entrance and blue accents, less glass coverage compared to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the glass roof, frame, and base, with a side extension visible.
